channel.title: Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings

item.title: When NOT to use the repository pattern in EF Core
item.description: If you design an application with a data source, the repository pattern often comes to mind as a prominent choice. In fact, many developers see it as the default choice. However, the pattern is not helping every time. In this post, I will pinpoint some cases where the repository pattern Link to article: https://blog.elmah.io/when-not-to-use-the-repository-pattern-in-ef-core/
